input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.5.3
            TITLE: any fasteners used to attach accumulator container(s) are critical fasteners, see t.8.2

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.5.3: Any fasteners used to attach Accumulator Container(s) are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2
F.10.5.3 Any fasteners used to attach Accumulator Container(s) are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2

final_answer: Any fasteners used to attach Accumulator Container(s) are Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2
